milestoneTitle: M10.10c — Footer chevron switched from unicode char (U+2304) to inline 18×18 SVG. Glyph height no longer depends on font metrics (varied by platform/font stack, affecting the footer row's computed height). Fixed-viewport SVG, line-height: 0 on the wrapper so it contributes exactly 18px. Stroke inherits via currentColor from the footer's --text-3. Rotation transform on expand preserved. Bundles M10.10b — Footer label undebossed — text-shadow dropped, weight lowered 600 → 500, color swapped from rgba(0,0,0,0.35) to var(--text-3). Reads as a discreet muted hint rather than a design-element label. Chevron bumped 13px → 22px (width/height 14px → 22px) for visibility. Bundles M10.10 — Dashboard panel layout revised for the four slots (title / CTA / icon / expand affordance). Icon reverts to the right (rows 1-2, bottom-anchored) alongside title + CTA on the left — the M10.9d swap is undone. A new .dash-panel-footer row sits at the bottom of each panel, top-hairlined off the CTA row, carrying a debossed tap-to-expand label on the left and a rotating chevron on the right. Label text swaps via JS (syncDashPanelFooterLabel) between authored data-collapsed-label / data-expanded-label attributes on state change — 'Tap for courses & quizzes in progress ⌄' collapsed, 'Tap to hide ⌃' expanded. Chevron rotates 180° on expand (CSS-driven). Footer is always visible regardless of collapsed state; it's the explicit tap affordance, while the rest of the panel chrome still toggles via the existing click handler. Bundles M10.9d — Identity icon and CTA button positions swapped on Dashboard panels. Icon now leads (col 1, rows 1-2, bottom-aligned); title and CTA trail on the right (col 2, rows 1 + 2). Grid-template-columns flipped from `1fr auto` to `auto 1fr` so icon sizes to content. Bundles M10.9c — collapsed-state padding/row-gap override removed so the CTA no longer shifts vertically between collapsed and expanded states. Bundles M10.9b — Chevron removed from collapsible Dashboard panels. Silent affordance — panel card itself reads as tappable via cursor: pointer; tap discovery handles the rest. Chevron span stripped from index.html (all three panels); .dash-panel-chevron CSS block removed. Bundles M10.9 — Collapsible Dashboard panels (Learn / Projects / Tools). Default first-visit state is collapsed — only title + identity icon + CTA + chevron render; the tile list is hidden. Tap anywhere on the panel chrome (except the CTA button or inside the body) to toggle; per-panel state persists in localStorage under clhub.v1.dashPanel.{learn,projects,tools}. Debossed chevron glyph in the bottom-right corner rotates 180° on expand. Opacity-only fade-in (~180ms) on the body when expanding; collapse is instant (display:none) — no layout animation, reduced-motion honored. Tiles inside a collapsed panel stay registered with centerBandIO; their 0×0 boundingRect means they report non-intersecting, so activation holds until expand. Global expand-all / collapse-all toggle parked for a follow-up milestone. Bundles M10.8 — .dash-tile-kind loses its pill chrome (no border, no background fill) and inherits the .label-debossed impressed-into-glass recipe (rgba(0,0,0,0.35) text + paired highlight/shadow text-shadow, per the M9.3 idiom). The breadcrumb path reads as embedded into the tile surface — a hierarchy marker, not a status — leaving the right-side duration + state pills as the only pill elements in the row. Typography + layout preserved (uppercase, letter-spaced, flex-shrink, 65% max-width). Bundles M10.7 — Optional tile rows (.dash-tile-flags / .dash-tile-coverage / .dash-tile-progress) now collapse out of layout when absent. Previously the 5-row grid template reserved row-gaps between every row, so even when the extras weren't emitted, ~12px of phantom gap pushed the title off-center on short tiles. Now the explicit template covers only the two always-present rows (row1 + title); extras set grid-column: 2 and auto-flow into implicit rows below as needed. .dash-tile gains align-content: center so the stack centers vertically within min-height when only the two rows exist — title reads centered on plain tiles (Dashboard Tools, dashboard Projects placeholder) and still anchors top-aligned when coverage/progress pushes the tile taller. Bundles M10.6 — Breadcrumb kind pill (.dash-tile-kind) on the LEFT of row 1, with the existing duration + state cluster on the RIGHT. Format: 'Kind › Subcategory' following the tab's subcategory hierarchy (e.g. 'Lesson › Skills', 'Project › Best path', 'Tool › Anthropic'). Eyebrow row retired — its content migrated into the breadcrumb pill. Row 1 is now a flex container (.dash-tile-row1) with space-between. Cascaded across Learn list (renderLearnItemRow), dashboard Learn panel (renderDashLearn), dashboard Projects panel (renderContinueCard), and the three static dashboard Tools tiles in index.html. 'updated Xh ago' metadata drops from condensed view (lives in expand card only — it's metadata, not hierarchy). Bundles M10.5 — .dash-tile gains a subtle top-to-bottom gradient (58% → 72% page-tone, was flat 45%) so list items read as a distinct layer against the near-white panel. Border nudged from 0.07 to 0.09 alpha, inset specular highlight bumped 0.65 → 0.70, baseline shadow 0.04 → 0.05. Hover goes brighter (28% page-tone, flat, no gradient — brighten is the signal). Stays subtle, Apple-glass preserved, text readability untouched. Bundles M10.4 — title reduced to 14px / 500 weight (was 16px / 600). Previous size read as too dominant on phone list scroll. Bundles M10.3 — activation band widened to 20%–72% of viewport (rootMargin '-20% 0px -28% 0px'), up from the M9.16a 20%-tall strip. Narrow band made tiles feel twitchy on phone scroll; the wider slot lets a whole panel's interior sit inside the activation window as it passes through. Bundles M10.2 — Per-tile activation. The activation band now observes every .dash-tile individually instead of cascading from .dash-panel / .learn-zone into their children. Panels still activate as a whole when they enter the center band (chrome lift unchanged); tiles inside light up one-by-one as each crosses the band. New observeDashTiles(scope) helper is called from registerCenterActivations on init and from renderDashLearn / renderContinueCard / renderLearn after every paint — idempotent via a one-shot flag on each tile. CSS: dropped the descendant .dash-panel.is-activated .dash-tile rule; replaced with self-scoped .dash-tile.is-activated using the same shadow recipe. Reduced-motion transition-none list gains .dash-tile. Also bundles M10.1 — Dashboard Tools panel migrated to .dash-tile with tap-to-expand parity (Claude Pro Max 20× / GitHub Copilot Pro / SuperGrok Heavy alias tiles; buildToolTileExpand reads from tile dataset; expand CTA routes to Tools tab). Tile-grammar cascade now covers all three Dashboard panels.
